name: Shanghai Pudong Construction Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Pudong Construction Co.,Ltd. engages in the construction of infrastructure projects in China. The company constructs roads and bridges. It also manufactures and distributes asphalt products; and provides financial services, as well as operates in the environment protection industry. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Pudong Road & Bridge Construction Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Pudong Construction Co.,Ltd. in March 2021. Shanghai Pudong Construction Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Shanghai, China.
